__fixture__.name: repair_card_local_pin_workspace_python
__fixture__.scenario: Local-scope repair card promoted from a workspace where the interpreter cell auto-detected a Python on PATH that does not match the workspace's intended pin. The card pins the resolved interpreter to the workspace, naming the local-only scope, the user-workspace authority, the local user-confirmation consent gate, and the writes_workspace_setting + rebinds_workspace_pin side effects. Cites the execution-context snapshot the strip resolved against and the transport posture the strip read.

what_changes_sentence: Sets the workspace's interpreter pin to the detected Python 3.12 toolchain so future task launches and terminal sessions resolve to the same interpreter.
where_it_applies_sentence: Applies only to this workspace on this device; no remote target, managed provider, or org policy bundle is touched.

evidence_links.evidence_note: Snapshot the strip resolved against; interpreter cell shows the detected Python 3.12 with no workspace pin.
Posture object the strip read; not modified by this action.
